verses.arabicText: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفْسُهُۥ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
verses.translationText: And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein

verses.arabicText: إِذْ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلْمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٌۭ
verses.translationText: When the two receivers receive, seated on the right and on the left.

verses.arabicText: مَّا يَلْفِظُ مِن قَوْلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيْهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٌۭ
verses.translationText: Man does not utter any word except that with him is an observer prepared [to record].

verses.arabicText: وَجَآءَتْ سَكْرَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنْهُ تَحِيدُ
verses.translationText: And the intoxication of death will bring the truth; that is what you were trying to avoid.

verses.arabicText: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْوَعِيدِ
verses.translationText: And the Horn will be blown. That is the Day of [carrying out] the threat.

verses.arabicText: وَجَآءَتْ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۢ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقٌۭ وَشَهِيدٌۭ
verses.translationText: And every soul will come, with it a driver and a witness.

verses.arabicText: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِى غَفْلَةٍۢ مِّنْ هَٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌۭ
verses.translationText: [It will be said], "You were certainly in unmindfulness of this, and We have removed from you your cover, so your sight, this Day, is sharp."

verses.arabicText: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَٰذَا مَا لَدَىَّ عَتِيدٌ
verses.translationText: And his companion, [the angel], will say, "This [record] is what is with me, prepared."

verses.arabicText: أَلْقِيَا فِى جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدٍۢ
verses.translationText: [Allah will say], "Throw into Hell every obstinate disbeliever,

verses.arabicText: مَّنَّاعٍۢ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍۢ مُّرِيبٍ
verses.translationText: Preventer of good, aggressor, and doubter,

verses.arabicText: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَأَلْقِيَاهُ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلشَّدِيدِ
verses.translationText: Who made [as equal] with Allah another deity; then throw him into the severe punishment."

verses.arabicText: ۞ قَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ رَبَّنَا مَآ أَطْغَيْتُهُۥ وَلَٰكِن كَانَ فِى ضَلَٰلٍۭ بَعِيدٍۢ
verses.translationText: His [devil] companion will say, "Our Lord, I did not make him transgress, but he [himself] was in extreme error."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ لَا تَخْتَصِمُوا۟ لَدَىَّ وَقَدْ قَدَّمْتُ إِلَيْكُم بِٱلْوَعِيدِ
verses.translationText: [Allah] will say, "Do not dispute before Me, while I had already presented to you the warning.

verses.arabicText: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلْقَوْلُ لَدَىَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِظَلَّٰمٍۢ لِّلْعَبِيدِ
verses.translationText: The word will not be changed with Me, and never will I be unjust to the servants."

verses.arabicText: يَوْمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٍۢ
verses.translationText: On the Day We will say to Hell, "Have you been filled?" and it will say, "Are there some more,"

verses.arabicText: وَأُزْلِفَتِ ٱلْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ
verses.translationText: And Paradise will be brought near to the righteous, not far,

verses.arabicText: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٍۢ
verses.translationText: [It will be said], "This is what you were promised - for every returner [to Allah] and keeper [of His covenant]

verses.arabicText: مَّنْ خَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلْبٍۢ مُّنِيبٍ
verses.translationText: Who feared the Most Merciful unseen and came with a heart returning [in repentance].

verses.arabicText: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَٰمٍۢ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُلُودِ
verses.translationText: Enter it in peace. This is the Day of Eternity."

verses.arabicText: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيْنَا مَزِيدٌۭ
verses.translationText: They will have whatever they wish therein, and with Us is more.
